package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_returns_http_status_errors: Repositories that construct transport-layer error objects or status-code wrappers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule134NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule134NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule134NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario134Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule134NegativeService, input Rule134NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
